message:
test(notifications): expand proptest from 7 to 29 properties (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add strategies for NotificationDeliveryRecord and NotificationDelivery
(serialize-only types). New properties cover: JSON validity, field count,
value roundtrips, large u64 boundaries, confidence edge values, record
field preservation, delivery boolean/records preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
